name: Aclara Resources Inc.
description: Aclara Resources Inc. is a development-stage rare earth company focused on the extraction and processing of heavy rare earth elements through its Penco Module project in Chile and the Carimbé project in Brazil. The company utilizes a unique and environmentally friendly extraction process known as Circular Mineral Harvesting, which eliminates the need for tailings dams and minimizes water consumption by recycling up to 95% of the water used. Aclara aims to become a leading global supplier of high-purity heavy rare earths, specifically dysprosium and terbium, which are critical components for the production of permanent magnets used in electric vehicle motors and wind turbines.
